ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "grade_level" INTEGER /* Grade level of the student */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the student attends */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the student or their guardian */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student or their guardian */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent or guardian of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the school */,
  "principal" TEXT /* Name of the school principal */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the school */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the school */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the school */,
  "enrollment_size" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled in the school */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the school was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teachers" (
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the teacher */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the teacher */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the teacher */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school where the teacher is employed */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject taught by the teacher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the teacher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the teacher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the teacher */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the teacher was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the teacher left the school (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teachers_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher who teaches the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is offered */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Academic year in which the course is offered */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "grade" REAL /* Grade earned by the student in the course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, dropped, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who earned the grade */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject in which the grade was earned */,
  "grade" REAL /* Grade earned by the student in the subject */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the grade was earned */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Academic year in which the grade was earned */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher who assigned the grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course in which the assignment was given */,
  "assignment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assignment */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the assignment */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher who created the assignment */,
  "points_possible" INTEGER /* Total points possible for the assignment */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the assignment (e.g., homework, quiz, project) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignment_submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment submitted */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who submitted the assignment */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the assignment was submitted */,
  "grade" REAL /* Grade earned by the student on the assignment */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher who graded the assignment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comments or feedback provided by the teacher */,
  "late_submission" INTEGER /* Whether the submission was late */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignment_submissions_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignment_submissions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignment_submissions_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES assignments ("assignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student whose attendance is being recorded */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course in which the student is enrolled */,
  "attendance_date" TEXT /* Date of the attendance record */,
  "present" INTEGER /* Whether the student was present on that date */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher who recorded the attendance */,
  "period" TEXT /* Specific period or class during which the attendance was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., teacher, administrator, parent) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who has the permission */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student whose data the user can access */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity occurred */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
